title: Computer Networks
description: Introduces network architectures, TCP/IP fundamentals, routing, switching, and basic network security with hands-on Cisco Packet Tracer labs.

title: Web Technology
description: Covers modern web development concepts including responsive design, frontend workflows, RESTful APIs, and deployment of full-stack applications.

title: Linux Administration
description: Focuses on Linux server setup, shell scripting, user and permission management, service configuration, and troubleshooting in lab environments.

title: Database Systems
description: Explores relational design, SQL optimization, normalization, transactions, and practical database-backed application design using MySQL and PostgreSQL.
